titleStmt.title: SII 39.182: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 182. (A.R. No. 182 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VIJAYAGAṆḌAGOPĀLADĒVA-4TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription refers to an agreement made by the great assembly of Kaṭṭaṉūr alias Uttamachōḻachaturvēdimaṅgalam which was a tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam of the temple Sittiramēḻi-Tiruppuṭkuḻi-nāyaṉār in Dāmaṟ nāḍu, a sub-division of Dāmaṟkōṭṭam that they should not mortgage any lands of that village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vicaiyakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 vatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattut tāmarkkoṭṭattut tāmar
nāṭṭu tiruppati cittirameḻit tiruppuṭkuḻi nāyaṉār koyil śrī paṇṭārattārkku Ināyaṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kaṭṭaṉūrāṉa Uttamacoḻa caturvvedimaṅkalattu
mahāsabhaiyārom Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvāṇṭait tai mātavarai Ivvūr Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa nāṟpāṟ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa prāptikaḷil puṟampu cilaṟku viṟṟatumillai
melum puṟampu Oriṭattilum viṟkavum Oṟṟivaikkavum dāṉaṅkaḷum paṇṇak kaṭavomalla śrī paṇṭārattārai Aṟivittu śrī paṇṭārattile kuṭukkumatoḻiya viṟkakkaṭavom Eṉṟu
piṟantatuṇṭākil nāyaṉār Āṇai maṟuttār paṭṭatum pāṭu camaiya teṇṭamum paṭakkaṭavom Ivvūr mahāsabhaiyom . § Ivai varadarāja bhaṭṭasya Allāḷabhaṭṭasya mahā
mahāsabhaikkuc camainta Ūrkaṇakku tattaṉūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cittirameḻic camaiyakaṇakkup pecum perumānāṉa taṇṭaka nāṭṭu veḷāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
